languages.original_text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."

languages.text: "Элантах, будь осторожен. То, что ждет внутри, голодно. И оно, будто зверь, чует наше приближение".
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."
languages.original_text: "Элантах, будь осторожен. То, что ждет внутри, голодно. И оно, будто зверь, чует наше приближение".

traits.locale_text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."
"Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."
"Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."

languages.text: 「エランタ、用心しなさい。待ち受けるものは飢えに苦しむ。獣のように、我々の接近を察知している」
languages.original_text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."

traits.locale_text: エランタチ、用心しなさい。待ち受けるものは飢えに苦しむ。獣のように、我々の接近を察知している。

languages.text: « Méfiez-vous, elantach. Ce qui vous attend à l'intérieur a faim et a déjà flairé notre présence, comme une bête. »
languages.original_text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."

traits.locale_text: « Méfiez-vous, elantach. Ce qui vous attend à l'intérieur a faim et a déjà flairé notre présence, comme une bête. »

languages.text: "Elantach, seid wachsam. Was immer da drin wartet, ist hungrig. Und wie ein Tier wittert es Euch."
languages.original_text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."

traits.locale_text: "Elantach, seid wachsam. Was immer da drin wartet, ist hungrig. Und wie ein Tier wittert es Euch."

languages.text: "Elantach, temkinli ol. İçeride bekleyen şey aç. Bir canavar gibi yaklaştığımızı hissediyor."
languages.original_text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."

traits.locale_text: "Elantach, temkinli ol. İçeride bekleyen şey aç. Bir canavar gibi yaklaştığımızı hissediyor."

languages.text: «Cuidado, elantach. Lo que aguarda dentro es voraz. Y al igual que una bestia, percibe nuestra presencia».
languages.original_text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."

traits.locale_text: «Cuidado, elantach. Lo que aguarda dentro es voraz. Y al igual que una bestia, percibe nuestra presencia».

languages.text: “外界人，当心，里面的东西正饥饿难耐。它像野兽一样感知到了我们的靠近。”
languages.original_text: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."

traits.locale_text: “外界人，当心，里面的东西正饥饿难耐。它像野兽一样感知到了我们的靠近。”
